title: digitaria ciliaris var. criniformis
intro: Digitaria ciliaris var. criniformis, also known as criniform buffalo grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Digitaria ciliaris var. criniformis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Digitaria ciliaris var. criniformis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health ailments.
